description: Possibly a letter, copy of a letter, or some sort of narrative. In Arabic script. The layout is most consistent with a literary text, and there are distinct sections with headers in larger script. Looks tantalizing, but it is difficult to figure out what it's about. Needs further examination.
description_he: טקסט ספרותי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
